title: Bluesky CEO Just Got FIRED?!
description:
Plot twist! Jay Graber is OUT as the CEO of Bluesky, just a day after our video talking about the numbers being in decline. The board is searching for an interim CEO and Jay is being demoted to a new position in tech. This tells me she was FIRED but they wanted to keep her on for the optics. Then we talk about how even Twitter founder Jack Dorsey quit the Bluesky board because the site is TERRIBLE.

Watch the podcast episodes on YouTube and all major podcast hosts including Spotify.

CLOWNFISH TV is an independent, opinionated news and commentary podcast that covers Entertainment and Tech from a consumer’s point of view. We talk about Gaming, Comics, Anime, TV, Movies, Animation and more. Hosted by Kneon and Geeky Sparkles.
